dashboards_data.name: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics V3
dashboards_data.description: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics V3 - adds MTTD/MTTI/MTTC/MTTE/MTTR to V2.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases  
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases




| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases





| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = alerts
| filter uppercase(severity) = "CRITICAL" or uppercase(severity) = "HIGH"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(data_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools

dataset = cases   
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment  = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases

| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases



| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by data_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = total_alerts

dataset = alerts
| filter uppercase(severity) = "CRITICAL" or uppercase(severity) = "HIGH"
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by data_source
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_lag_seconds

dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp count(alert_id) as alert_count, avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms by data_source
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| fields data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds
| sort desc avg_lag_seconds
| limit 20

dataset = alerts
| alter event_ts = arrayindex(event_timestamp, 0)
| filter event_ts != null
| alter event_ms = to_integer(event_ts)
| alter alert_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter mttd_ms = subtract(alert_ms, event_ms)
| filter mttd_ms >= 0 and mttd_ms < 86400000
| alter mttd_seconds = divide(mttd_ms, 1000)
| comp avg(mttd_seconds) as avg_mttd_sec
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttd_sec

dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_first = if(event_type = "command" and uppercase(phase) = "ANALYSIS", t_ms, null)
| alter t_verdict = if(event_type = "analysis_complete", t_ms, null)
| comp max(t_first) as first_ms, max(t_verdict) as verdict_ms by incident_id
| filter verdict_ms != null and first_ms != null
| alter mtti_ms = subtract(verdict_ms, first_ms)
| filter mtti_ms > 0
| alter mtti_minutes = divide(mtti_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mtti_minutes) as avg_mtti_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mtti_min

dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_contain = if(phase = "containment", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_contain) as contain_ms by incident_id
| filter contain_ms != null
| alter mttc_ms = subtract(contain_ms, first_ms)
| filter mttc_ms > 0
| alter mttc_minutes = divide(mttc_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mttc_minutes) as avg_mttc_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttc_min

dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_erad = if(phase = "eradication", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_erad) as erad_ms by incident_id
| filter erad_ms != null
| alter mtte_ms = subtract(erad_ms, first_ms)
| filter mtte_ms > 0
| alter mtte_minutes = divide(mtte_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mtte_minutes) as avg_mtte_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mtte_min

dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_rec = if(phase = "recovery", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_rec) as rec_ms by incident_id
| filter rec_ms != null
| alter mttr_ms = subtract(rec_ms, first_ms)
| filter mttr_ms > 0
| alter mttr_minutes = divide(mttr_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mttr_minutes) as avg_mttr_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttr_min

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases



| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases  
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW"  or xdm.case.status_progress  = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases





| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Cases Auto Resolved
widgets_data.description: This includes deduping (Palo SOC Framework), auto triage, and auto-resolution by XSIAM

data.phrase:
dataset = cases   
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment  = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases

| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Total Alerts By Source
widgets_data.description: Alert count grouped by vendor data source (DS: tag).

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by data_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = total_alerts

dataset = cases  
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases  
| sort desc total_cases




| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: Critical Alerts by Source
widgets_data.description: Critical+High severity alerts grouped by vendor data source (DS: tag).

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| filter uppercase(severity) = "CRITICAL" or uppercase(severity) = "HIGH"
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by data_source
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = data_source yaxis = critical_alerts

dataset = alerts
| filter uppercase(severity) = "CRITICAL" or uppercase(severity) = "HIGH"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = critical_alerts

widgets_data.title: Avg Alert Ingestion Lag (sec)
widgets_data.description: Average delay (seconds) from event capture (_time) to alert record creation (alert_arrival_timestamp), across all DS-tagged sources.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_lag_seconds

widgets_data.title: Security Tools Integrated
widgets_data.description: Distinct vendor data sources (DS: tags) emitting alerts.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| comp count_distinct(data_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools

widgets_data.title: Top 20 Slowest Data Sources
widgets_data.description: Twenty slowest data sources by average alert ingestion lag. Columns: data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter ds_tags = arrayfilter(original_tags, "@element" contains "DS:")
| alter ds_raw = arrayindex(ds_tags, 0)
| alter data_source = replace(ds_raw, "DS:", "")
| filter data_source != null
| alter arrival_ms = to_integer(alert_arrival_timestamp)
| alter time_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter lag_ms = subtract(arrival_ms, time_ms)
| filter lag_ms >= 0 and lag_ms < 86400000
| comp count(alert_id) as alert_count, avg(lag_ms) as avg_lag_ms by data_source
| alter avg_lag_seconds = divide(avg_lag_ms, 1000)
| fields data_source, alert_count, avg_lag_seconds
| sort desc avg_lag_seconds
| limit 20

widgets_data.title: MTTD (sec)
widgets_data.description: Mean Time to Detect - source event (event_timestamp) -> alert record creation (_time). Alerts-native, no framework dependency. Seconds.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| alter event_ts = arrayindex(event_timestamp, 0)
| filter event_ts != null
| alter event_ms = to_integer(event_ts)
| alter alert_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter mttd_ms = subtract(alert_ms, event_ms)
| filter mttd_ms >= 0 and mttd_ms < 86400000
| alter mttd_seconds = divide(mttd_ms, 1000)
| comp avg(mttd_seconds) as avg_mttd_sec
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttd_sec

widgets_data.title: MTTI (min)
widgets_data.description: Mean Time to Investigate - framework first touch -> analysis_complete write per incident. Requires xql-post-to-dataset task in Analysis Evaluation playbooks. Minutes.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_first = if(event_type = "command" and uppercase(phase) = "ANALYSIS", t_ms, null)
| alter t_verdict = if(event_type = "analysis_complete", t_ms, null)
| comp max(t_first) as first_ms, max(t_verdict) as verdict_ms by incident_id
| filter verdict_ms != null and first_ms != null
| alter mtti_ms = subtract(verdict_ms, first_ms)
| filter mtti_ms > 0
| alter mtti_minutes = divide(mtti_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mtti_minutes) as avg_mtti_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mtti_min

widgets_data.title: MTTC (min)
widgets_data.description: Mean Time to Contain - framework first touch -> first containment action per incident. Validated at ~28 sec on brumxdr. Minutes.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_contain = if(phase = "containment", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_contain) as contain_ms by incident_id
| filter contain_ms != null
| alter mttc_ms = subtract(contain_ms, first_ms)
| filter mttc_ms > 0
| alter mttc_minutes = divide(mttc_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mttc_minutes) as avg_mttc_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttc_min

widgets_data.title: MTTE (min)
widgets_data.description: Mean Time to Eradicate - framework first touch -> first eradication action per incident. Minutes.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_erad = if(phase = "eradication", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_erad) as erad_ms by incident_id
| filter erad_ms != null
| alter mtte_ms = subtract(erad_ms, first_ms)
| filter mtte_ms > 0
| alter mtte_minutes = divide(mtte_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mtte_minutes) as avg_mtte_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mtte_min

widgets_data.title: MTTR (min)
widgets_data.description: Mean Time to Recover - framework first touch -> first recovery action per incident. Minutes.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_socfw_ir_execution_raw
| filter execution_mode = "shadow"
| alter t_ms = to_epoch(_time, "millis")
| alter t_rec = if(phase = "recovery", t_ms, null)
| comp min(t_ms) as first_ms, min(t_rec) as rec_ms by incident_id
| filter rec_ms != null
| alter mttr_ms = subtract(rec_ms, first_ms)
| filter mttr_ms > 0
| alter mttr_minutes = divide(mttr_ms, 60000)
| comp avg(mttr_minutes) as avg_mttr_min
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = avg_mttr_min
